summary: Phase 4 (Auto-Detect + Preview) testing completed. All 20 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend Import Wizard works correctly with 4-step stepper. Found and fixed 1 bug: tipo_dado mapping issue in ColunaLayout.from_dict that prevented test-parse with inline config from working.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v1/import-layouts - Returns layouts list with total_regras
✅ POST /api/v1/import-layouts/detect - config_planilha structure correct (nome_aba, linha_cabecalho, linha_inicio_dados)
✅ POST /api/v1/import-layouts/detect - colunas structure correct (coluna_excel, nome_cabecalho, campo_destino, tipo_dado, confianca)
✅ POST /api/v1/import-layouts/detect - Invalid base64 handled with 400/500 error
✅ POST /api/v1/import-layouts/test-parse - resumo structure correct (total, ok, fora_periodo, sem_conta)
✅ POST /api/v1/import-layouts/test-parse - lancamentos structure correct (linha, status, data, valor, etc.)
✅ POST /api/v1/import-layouts/test-parse - Works with inline layout_config (AFTER FIX)
✅ Integration: detect → test-parse flow works end-to-end
✅ Frontend: /upload shows Import Wizard with 4-step stepper
✅ Frontend: Wizard Step 1 has file dropzone, CNPJ input, month/year selects, email input
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: ColunaLayout.from_dict was failing when tipo_dado='data' (Portuguese) was passed from detect endpoint. The TipoDado enum expects 'date' (English). Added mapping in from_dict to convert detect types ('data', 'decimal_br', 'decimal_dc', 'cnpj_cpf', 'campo_composto', 'tipo_dc') to valid enum values ('date', 'decimal', 'string').
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 2 layouts and sample file at /app/sample_input.xls
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 verified: (1) POST /api/v1/import-layouts/detect returns auto-detected layout with config_planilha, colunas (34 columns for sample file), config_valor, templates_regras, preview_dados. (2) POST /api/v1/import-layouts/test-parse works with both layout_id and inline layout_config, returns lancamentos with status (ok/fora_periodo/sem_conta) and resumo counts. (3) Frontend Import Wizard at /upload has 4 steps: Upload → Revisão → Contas → Preview. (4) Legacy upload at /upload/classic still works. (5) Fixed tipo_dado mapping bug in ColunaLayout.from_dict.

phase4_verification.detect_endpoint: VERIFIED - Returns config_planilha, colunas, config_valor, templates_regras, preview_dados, abas
phase4_verification.test_parse_with_inline_config: VERIFIED (after bug fix) - Same response as layout_id version
phase4_verification.import_wizard: VERIFIED - 4-step stepper (Upload, Revisão, Contas, Preview), all Step 1 inputs present
phase4_verification.regression: VERIFIED - All existing pages (Dashboard, Layouts, Lotes, Mapeamentos, Perfis) still work

bug_fixed.issue: test-parse with inline layout_config failed with 'data is not a valid TipoDado'
bug_fixed.root_cause: detect_usecases.py returns tipo_dado values in Portuguese/custom format (e.g., 'data', 'decimal_br') but TipoDado enum expects English values ('date', 'decimal')
bug_fixed.fix_description: Added tipo_dado_map to normalize detect types to valid enum values before creating ColunaLayout
